name: Sony WH-1000XM6
context: Features Quick Attention transparency mode and location-based listening settings. Blocks rumbling bus engines, plane cabin din, chatty passengers, and squeaky brakes with combined ANC and passive isolation.

name: Anker Soundcore Life Q30
context: V-shaped sound profile emphasizing thump and boom, adjustable via companion app. ANC performance similar to the Space Q45 at a significantly lower price.

name: Apple AirPods Max (2nd Generation)
context: The hybrid active noise cancelation system provides optimal noise attenuation among the best pure noise cancellers tested. They support Adaptive EQ, adjusting frequency response in real time based on fit to maintain consistent sound quality.

name: Anker Soundcore Space Q45
context: V-shaped sound profile with extra emphasis on bass and treble. Adaptive ANC system adjusts to your environment, blocking noise across the spectrum effectively.

name: M4U 9
context: Effective noise cancellation. High-quality sound reproduction.
